title: Reproducible Repository, Toolchain, and Dependency Stewardship · Product Reasoning Brief: Toolchain Pin
summary: The product runs only on one machine with floating tools, unexplained generated files, unclear license, secrets in examples, and no clean-start proof. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pp1 toolchain pin increment in reproducible healthy project repository. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pin supported runtime, package manager, compiler, formatter, linter, type checker, test runner, and build behavior with compatibility evidence.
Establish purpose, setup, architecture, commands, contribution, conduct, support, security, license, and ownership documentation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
